title: Selling Courses Without Teachable or Gumroad: Which Option Actually Works for You in 2025
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, stuck in limbo because PayPal and Stripe have blocked you due to geographic restrictions. You've got a wealth of knowledge to share, but every platform you try refuses to let you set up shop. The frustration is real: you've invested time and money into creating courses, but now you're struggling to find a way to sell them without being shut down. It's time to break free from the constraints of traditional payment processors and explore a new, crypto-native way to monetize your expertise.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's take a closer look at the options available to you. Teachable, a popular platform for selling courses, charges a 0% transaction fee, but you'll need to comply with their strict payment processor requirements. Gumroad, another well-known platform, has no transaction fees, but you'll need to navigate their complex payment flow. Meanwhile, NOWPayments, a crypto-native payment processor, offers a flat 0.5% transaction fee and no KYC requirements. But which one actually meets your needs?
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Now, let's talk about how each option handles restricted countries. Teachable and Gumroad, like many other platforms, have strict geographic restrictions in place, which means you're unlikely to be able to use them from Nigeria. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is designed to work globally, with no country restrictions or limitations. This means you can finally sell your courses without worrying about being shut down.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, NOWPayments stands out from the crowd. With a flat 0.5% transaction fee, you'll know exactly how much you're paying, with no hidden costs or surprises. Meanwhile, Teachable and Gumroad often have complex payment flows that can lead to delays and additional fees. With NOWPayments, you can say goodbye to frustrating payment delays and hello to transparent, fast transactions.
Traditional payment processors are designed to restrict access to certain countries, limiting your ability to monetize your expertise.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automating the delivery of your courses is a game-changer for any creator. NOWPayments makes it easy to set up automated delivery, so you can focus on what matters most: creating high-quality content. With their Admin Dashboard, you can manage transactions, view order history, and monitor real-time analytics, giving you complete control over your sales flow. This means you can scale your business with confidence, knowing that your customers are receiving their courses seamlessly.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing crypto-native infrastructure does not mean your buyers need to understand crypto. The Web3 Wallet Connect module generates QR codes for each supported coin, displays live USD-equivalent prices, and guides buyers through the payment flow in plain language. Most buyers complete a crypto payment in under two minutes, even if it is their first time. NOWPayments handles the transaction confirmation and fires the webhook that triggers automated delivery. From the buyer's perspective, they paid and received their product. From your perspective, you received funds in a wallet you control without any platform intermediary between you and your revenue. That is the practical outcome of building on the right infrastructure from the start.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments is the only payment processor that offers a flat 0.5% transaction fee, with no hidden costs or surprises.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about crypto-native payment processors, be sure to check out our blog post on the benefits of using NOWPayments. You can also explore our Admin Dashboard, which provides a comprehensive overview of your sales flow and helps you manage transactions with ease. By leveraging the power of crypto, you can break free from the constraints of traditional payment processors and focus on what matters most: creating high-quality content.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
Automating the delivery of your courses is a key differentiator for NOWPayments, allowing you to scale your business with confidence.
Admin Dashboard — $29.99. Transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. See every order, every payment, every delivery — from anywhere in the world.
